name: Hangzhou Raycloud Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Raycloud Technology Co., Ltd. operates as an e-commerce software and service technology company. The company offers various products and services that help e-commerce merchants to do business. It provides e-commerce SaaS products and supporting hardware, as well as CRM SMS and operation services. The company's e-commerce SaaS products include super store manager, super express, and other software. Hangzhou Raycloud Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
